positive: A highly detailed, stylized minimalist celestial forest scene. Imagine giant, glowing bioluminescent flora forming an ethereal, enclosed grove at night. The main subjects are intricate, stylized silhouettes of massive, fern-like plants and spiraling, glowing crystal vines. The composition must be centered and balanced, with strong contrast between the deep indigo/midnight blue background and the vibrant, neon cyan and warm gold accents of the flora. Use thick, clean lines suitable for screen printing or textile printing. The overall style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curve theory and Japanese ukiyo-e print aesthetics, evoking mystery and deep peace. Perfect for a central apparel print.
